title: Stir Fry with Baby Pak Choi
description: A simple and quick stir fry recipe perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish combines the flavors of spicy and juicy pak choi with a crunchy salad.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and sliced ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the baby pak choi and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes or until wilted.
Add the soy sauce and stir-fry for another minute.
Toss in the salad and stir-fry for a few seconds.
Optional: Add your favorite protein such as tofu or shrimp to make this a heartier meal.
